evals.prompt: I have 850 keywords for example.com and need US organic keyword difficulty plus search volume. Plan the minimum DataForSEO MCP calls, exact chunking, validation, and normalized output without making live calls.
evals.expected_output: Selects Bulk Keyword Difficulty for all 850 terms and Keyword Overview in two chunks because its maximum is 700; distinguishes KD from Ads competition; includes scope, cost, error, and missing-row handling.

evals.prompt: Design a DataForSEO MCP workflow for a mobile local search audit of three plumbing keywords in Austin, Texas. Include tool names, arguments, call count, local-pack parsing, and listing evidence without claiming access to private Google Business Profile data.
evals.expected_output: Uses SERP location resolution, three Live Organic calls, and an optional coordinate-based Business Listings Search; keeps organic, local-pack, and listing evidence distinct and states billable scope.

evals.prompt: My raw remote DataForSEO MCP integration returns an expired bearer-token error and some REST calls show internal code 40209 despite HTTP 200. Explain the exact layers, refresh flow, retry policy, concurrency limit, and example request/response envelopes.
evals.expected_output: Separates MCP HTTP/JSON-RPC from DataForSEO REST/internal status, documents OAuth refresh_token form flow, recognizes 40209 as excessive concurrency, and recommends bounded backoff below 30 concurrent requests.
